chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C.P. No. D – 8019 of 2019 [Umar Hayat versus FOP others] Petitioner: Umar Hayat son of Ghulam Haider Mr. Manzoor Hameed Arain, Advocate. Respondents 1&3: Nemo. Respondents 2&4: Director, Directorate General I&I and Additional Director, ASO, through Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate. Date of hearing: 31-10-2025 Date of decision: 31-10-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. – For reasons disclosed in the accompanying affidavit, the listed application for restoration of the petition is allowed. Petition is restored and is taken up for hearing. The Petitioner seeks implementation of an order passed by the Customs Appellate Tribunal in its favour. As held by the Supreme Court in Khalid v. Collector of Customs (2024 SCMR 1806), the Customs Appellate Tribunal is empowered to implement its orders, and ordinarily writ jurisdiction is not be invoked for such purpose. Therefore, petition is dismissed as not maintainable. JUDGE JUDGE SHABAN*
